рҹ“– Dashboard guide

How engineers and managers use Ms. Early Bird to track and act on at-risk cases.

1 В· Loading data

  • The dashboard opens with a bundled demo snapshot.
  • в¬Ҷ Load latest export В· pick an .xlsx. It accepts either a raw Dynamics export (scored live in your browser) or an already-scored file.
  • Everything runs locally in your browser В· nothing is uploaded to a server, and it works offline.
  • re-score forces browser scoring even on a scored file; в¬Ү Scored .xlsx saves the scored workbook.

2 В· Risk bands

BandMeaning
рҹ”ҙ CriticalProbability вүҘ 75% В· act now
рҹҹ  High55вҖ“74% В· watch closely
рҹҹЎ Medium30вҖ“54% В· monitor
рҹҹў Low< 30%, or waiting on customer / pending engineering / resolved В· deprioritised
рҹҹЈ EscalatedAlready escalated В· shown separately, not a вҖңpotentialвҖқ escalation

When a high-probability case is deprioritised by its status, the probability is greyed out and the band shows a reason (e.g. вҖңвҶ“ waiting on customerвҖқ) В· so the number and band never look contradictory.

3 В· KPIs

At-Risk Cases / Avg Prob / Top Risk count only Critical + High + Medium (genuine potential escalations). Already Escalated is its own KPI and filter.

4 В· Working the queue (At-Risk Cases tab)

  • Search + filter by band, engineer, priority; sort by probability, band, OCA, sentiment or due date.
  • On leave вҶ’ flags an engineer's cases and pins them for reassignment.
  • Assigned to dropdown reassigns a case (saved in your browser).
  • Expand a row (в–¶) for drivers, 4 AI quick-action buttons, and вң… Correct / вқҢ Wrong feedback that trains the model.
  • рҹҢҷ Dark-mode toggle in the header.

Ms. Early Bird В· Predictive Escalation Intelligence В· Model outputs: Escalation Probability, Risk Band, Escalation Reason В· Reassignments & feedback are saved locally in your browser. В© 2026 Adobe В· Confidential.
